name: cocounsel-legal
description: CoCounsel Legal delivers comprehensive Westlaw Deep Research reports with inline, linked citations to Westlaw and Practical Law sources.

interface.shortDescription: CoCounsel Legal delivers comprehensive Westlaw Deep Research reports with inline, linked citations to Westlaw and Practical Law sources.
interface.longDescription: CoCounsel Legal delivers comprehensive Westlaw Deep Research reports with inline, linked citations to Westlaw and Practical Law sources. Migrated for Codex as a repo-scoped plugin. V1 supports local files and pasted text by default; remote connectors must be configured separately.
defaultPrompt: Use CoCounsel Legal with local files or pasted text.
